mapper.select: SELECT P.CTKEY , P.PIDTKEY , P.OWKEY , P.ICKEY , P.SBKEY , P.LCKEY , P.ULCKEY , P.IVATKEY , P.EXQTY , P.CFQTY , P.UOM , P.ICUTKEY , P.FR_LCKEY , P.FR_ULCKEY , P.TO_LCKEY , P.TO_ULCKEY , P.OBHDKEY , P.OBDTKEY , P.IBHDKEY , P.IBDTKEY , P.WKSTATUS , P.LOGGRPCD , A.WRHOUS_SE FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT P , TWORK_MST_LC L , TWORK_MST_AR A WHERE P.CTKEY = L.CTKEY AND P.LCKEY = L.LCKEY AND L.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND L.ARKEY = A.ARKEY AND P.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND P.PIDTKEY = #{pidtkey}
